symbols.name: IEntityPermissionProvider
symbols.summary: Defines the contract for a service that provides access to entity permissions. This interface abstracts the storage and retrieval of permissions, allowing for different implementations.

syntax.content: public interface IEntityPermissionProvider

symbols.name: HasPermissionAsync(string, string[], object, string, CancellationToken)
symbols.summary: Checks if a user has a specific permission for an entity of type TEntity, either directly or through their roles.

syntax.content: Task HasPermissionAsync(string userId, string[] roles, object entityId, string permission, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)

parameters.description: The ID of the user.
The roles assigned to the user.
The ID of the specific entity.
The permission to check.
Token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: True if the user has the permission, false otherwise.

parameters.description: The ID of the user.
The roles assigned to the user.
The ID of the specific entity.
The permission to check.
Token to monitor for cancellation requests.

returns.description: True if the user has the permission, false otherwise.
